listings.title: Nord Electro 6D 61 with new Nord soft case
listings.body: For sale is a lightly used Nord Electro 6D (61 key version) which I purchased new from Pro Audio Star in May 2023. The keyboard has been lightly gigged and practiced on (approximately 30-40 shows) and stays in its case when not being used for gigs. I just purchased a new Nord soft bag for it last month ($200 value). The keyboard shows some light signs of wear on the bottom, red corner panels (light scratching on red paint). Otherwise the keyboard is in great overall cosmetic condition and perfect operational condition. Never had a problem with it, jut don't use it that much since moving on to another brand of keyboards. Price is pretty firm but would be open to offers if going to a musician in need. Feel free to hit me up with any questions. Would be willing to deliver it within a 50 miles radius of NYC. Thanks for viewing!
